AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Prohibits utility service terminations in multiple dwellings
Summary: Prohibits utility service terminations in multiple dwellings; authorizes utility companies or municipalities to commence an action against the owner of the premises affected to seek the appointment of a receiver of rents or payments for use and occupancy or common charges.
LawCode: Amd §235-a, RP L; amd §§33 & 116, Pub Serv L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the real property law and the public service law, in relation to prohibiting utility service terminations in multiple dwellings
